name: Balaji Selvaraj
title: Technical AI Leader
headline: Hands-on Technical AI Lead with 12+ years spanning product, services, and startup environments, leading a globally distributed AI team across 5 countries.

heroQuote.translation: Let all your thoughts be lofty.
heroQuote.author: திருவள்ளுவர் • Thiruvalluvar
heroQuote.imageAlt: Statue of the Tamil poet-philosopher Thiruvalluvar

credentialHook: Ranked top 0.3% globally on Kaggle (652/200K+ data scientists)

intro: I lead AI the way a CTO does — securing the sponsorship and setting the strategy before the first model exists.
Then building the platform, team, and guardrails that turn conviction into shipped, regulated value.
My edge: a biomedical engineer across 400+ surgeries and 5 specialties, now architecting production AI — science, business case, and system in one conversation.

strategicVision.title: Sell first, build next
strategicVision.description: Secure executive sponsorship and align portfolios before data or infrastructure exist — turning five ambiguous, competing directions into 2 funded, company-scale programs.

strategicVision.title: Executive influence, VP to EVP
strategicVision.description: Influence spanning VP → SVP → Chief Scientist → EVP, translating independently sourced AI ideas into sponsored, company-scale mandates.

strategicVision.title: Positioned across the org
strategicVision.description: Positioned a newly formed AI team across 7 internal groups and 3 startups by delivering differentiated and strategically valuable AI capabilities, aligned to AstraZeneca's 3 R&D priority areas — Oncology, Biopharma R&D, and CPSS — over three consecutive years.

strategicVision.title: Authored the 2030 roadmap
strategicVision.description: Shaped an innovative multimodal AI vision aligned with AstraZeneca's 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy ambitions, later submitted to Gartner by GITC Chennai.

businessImpact.title: $20–50M projected annual savings
businessImpact.description: Business case for the flagship $3M+ SVP-sponsored drug-safety AI platform — building predictive toxicology models that reduce animal studies and compress safety timelines from 5 to 3 years.

businessImpact.title: 5 years → 3 years
businessImpact.description: Compressed drug-safety study timelines by two years, converting model performance into regulated program speed.

businessImpact.title: $40K/yr + $3K/month recovered
businessImpact.description: Restructured tooling to recover $40K/yr in licensing and $3K/month in idle GPU spend, with cost treated as a design constraint.

businessImpact.title: ~6 months capacity freed
businessImpact.description: Refocused AI investments by retiring low-probability initiatives, recovering 6 months of delivery capacity and reducing infrastructure costs.

platform.title: The internal AI platform the org ships on
platform.description: Built a reusable, cross-platform foundation-model framework to standardize training, inference, and evaluation of vision foundation models across 3 clinical imaging modalities and 3 internal infrastructures.

platform.title: GxP-compliant production AI
platform.description: First on the team to deploy AWS SageMaker training and Lambda inference inside AstraZeneca's GxP-compliant AI-Bench — establishing the regulated path others build on.

platform.title: Distributed training at scale
platform.description: FSDP/DeepSpeed with spot-instance checkpointing, engineered so large-model training runs with cost as a first-class design constraint.

peopleMentoring.title: Scaled 1 → 12 across 5 countries
peopleMentoring.description: Scaled a multicultural AI engineering team from 1 to 12 members across India (6), UK (2), Sweden (2), Mexico (1), and China (1).

peopleMentoring.title: Career mentoring
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored 7 AI/ML graduate trainees across AstraZeneca and HCL — 4 progressed to full-time industry roles, with others advancing to postgraduate studies.

peopleMentoring.title: Kaggle coaching
peopleMentoring.description: Mentored a team of junior engineers (3) to secure a Kaggle Bronze (Top 6%, 76th/1,220).

peopleMentoring.title: Hackathon mentoring
peopleMentoring.description: Coached a 4-student team to a Top 4 national finish at Smart India Hackathon (2019).

governanceAI.title: EU AI Act risk mapping
governanceAI.description: Mapped AI deployments against EU AI Act risk tiers — classifying clinical decision-support tools as high-risk and defining conformity assessment, logging, and human-oversight obligations before deployment.

governanceAI.title: Transparency & audit-readiness
governanceAI.description: Designed AI pipelines with model cards, decision logs, and explainability layers to satisfy EU AI Act transparency mandates for high-risk systems in clinical workflows.

governancePrivacy.title: GDPR & HIPAA in clinical AI
governancePrivacy.description: Partnered with the Data Office to ensure AI pipelines processing patient and clinical data comply with GDPR and HIPAA — data minimisation, purpose limitation, and subject access rights built into the data architecture.

governancePrivacy.title: FAIR data for AI training
governancePrivacy.description: Governed training data under FAIR principles (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) in partnership with the Data Office — ensuring scientific rigour and cross-study reusability across AI models.

governanceGxP.title: GxP-compliant AI delivery
governanceGxP.description: Shipped AI inside regulated GxP boundaries, making compliance a build-time property rather than a release-time audit.

governanceGxP.title: Validation & audit trails
governanceGxP.description: Enforced change control and maintained end-to-end audit trails for AI systems in GxP settings — keeping documentation inspection-ready and reducing regulatory exposure at deployment.

contactIntro: Open to discussing AI leadership opportunities, research collaborations, and advisory roles.
